Document:
# The Maintenance Clause If you enter maintenance tunnels for any reason, you consent to being round-removed by antags at any time. Maintenance tunnels are considered Escalation-Light areas. Maintenance should be a spooky and scary place to be in. If you somehow find yourself in a trap and an antagonist gets you, you'll have firmly walked into their trap! Ahelp if you have any questions.
Antagonists: Feel free to make traps and set up elaborate schemes in order to ''lure'' people into maintenance. Note that under this clause, you cannot simply walk out, knock someone out and then drag them in to kill them. Whoever you wish to antagonize using this clause should already be in maintenance of their own volition.
